replies.msg:
Question: Some people say that music is a good way of bringing people of different cultures and ages together.
To what extent do you agree or disagree with this opinion?

According to some surveys, there is over 95% people in favour of music, therefore, some say that music is an important connection of bring people together no matter how big difference in terms of cultures and ages are. In my opinion, I substantially agree with this statement.
First of all, the most attractive part of the music is rhythm of the songs as everyone would hear the same beat even though they don’t fully understand the meanings of lyrics. Let’s take K-Pop as an example, K-Pop attracts wide audience groups who distribute across the world and not speak the same language. However, people are still willing to follow them and to be their fans. Therefore, it has proven that music is just a good way of connecting people but also accelerates the integration of different cultures.
In addition to that, it is undeniable that music can also overcome gaps of different ages. Music is available for every single one, no matter you are an elderly or a kid, as long as you like it. It is often argued that rock and jazz only belong to previous generation, by contrast, rap or K-pop are only listened by youths. However, as mentioned before, that are inaccurate thoughts as a result of people select music according to their tastes or styles.
In conclusion, music undoubtedly is a great method of being a linkage for people who are from different cultures and ages. People listen to music depending on their tastes instead of ages.

跪求連登神人幫下手
有冇機會攞到6.5

求幫忙

replies.msg: ielts writing 有standard 寫法，照copy 就得。 而家係你個format 都未寫好。 一開始係paraphrase topic,  +  agree/disagree + thesis statement.  之後一定係topic sentence + elaboration + example , conclusion 係reparaphrase thesis statement + expectation.  大約係咁啦。 高手就可以唔跟都高分嘅。

ielts writing 有standard 寫法，照copy 就得。 而家係你個format 都未寫好。 一開始係paraphrase topic,  +  agree/disagree + thesis statement.  之後一定係topic sentence + elaboration + example , conclusion 係reparaphrase thesis statement + expectation.  大約係咁啦。 高手就可以唔跟都高分嘅。
Topic sentence 你係點樣寫，有冇例子

quote.msg:
咁樣應該會好睇啲

According to some surveys, there is over 95% people in favour of music, therefore, some say that music is an important connection of bring people together no matter how big difference in terms of cultures and ages are. In my opinion, I substantially agree with this statement.
First of all, the most attractive part of the music is rhythm of the songs as everyone would hear the same beat even though they don’t fully understand the meanings of lyrics. Let’s take K-Pop as an example, K-Pop attracts wide audience groups who distribute across the world and not speak the same language. However, people are still willing to follow them and to be their fans. Therefore, it has proven that music is just a good way of connecting people but also accelerates the integration of different cultures.



In addition to that, it is undeniable that music can also overcome gaps of different ages. Music is available for every single one, no matter you are an elderly or a kid, as long as you like it. It is often argued that rock and jazz only belong to previous generation, by contrast, rap or K-pop are only listened by youths. However, as mentioned before, that are inaccurate thoughts as a result of people select music according to their tastes or styles.


In conclusion, music undoubtedly is a great method of being a linkage for people who are from different cultures and ages. People listen to music depending on their tastes instead of ages.

‘Let’s take k-pop as an example’ 邊個教你咁寫文
For example/ For instance, Korean pop music has a global reach.

‘In addition to that’ -> In addition

‘Available for’ -> available to

replies.msg: 仲有冇多啲
